title: The Iron Giant Moves Again
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Kuma, Unknown person #4, Luffy, Atlas, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.
scene: The Straw Hats, Bonney, giants, Vegapunk satellites, and the Iron Giant struggle to escape while the Five Elders press the island from every direction.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: hurry!! While I've got a hold of it!!

dialogue.speaker: Kuma
dialogue.text: Captain's orders are absolute, Bonney- Cham!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep going till you've crushed the life outta him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It won't be back anytime soon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What about USOP and the others?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were meant to fly down and meet us here...

summary: This part advances the Escape from Egghead through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
